body:
Until we figure out why v1.3 and DEV jobs time out on GitLab CI we can just allow v1.3 to fail.

v1.3 hasn't been released yet so makes sense to allow failures anyways.

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: Allow v1.3 GPU tests to fail on GitLab CI
